title: Connect an alert rule to IRM

blocks.content:
In this milestone, you update or create an alert rule so IRM can receive alerts from Grafana Alerting. For firing alerts to create IRM Alert groups, the alert rule must include the IRM contact point you created in the previous milestone.

To add the IRM contact point to an existing alert rule, complete the following steps:

1. In your Grafana Cloud stack, click **Alerting** > **Alert rules**.
1. Locate the rule you want to update.
1. Click the rule name to open its edit view.
1. Scroll to the **Contact points** section.
1. Add the IRM contact point. Leave any existing contact points if you still need their notifications.
1. Click **Save rule**.

If you don't have an existing alert rule that you can modify, consider one of these options:

- Duplicate an existing rule and modify the duplicate.
- Use the [TestData data source](/docs/grafana-cloud/connect-externally-hosted/data-sources/testdata/) to create a temporary test rule.

If neither option works, you can still proceed to the next milestone and use the **Send demo alert** function in IRM to complete a limited configuration test.

In the next milestone, you trigger an alert to test your setup and verify escalation, schedule resolution, and notification delivery.
